action.reasoning: Observation: checkpoint inspection shows cam_unet_v3 is not a legacy architecture at all; it uses modern-style keys (in_proj/down1.block) and stores weights under state_dict with model_type='cam_unet'. Analysis: our repeated resume failures likely come from loader/model-name mismatches (camera_mlp vs cam_mlp and model_type aliasing), not true architecture incompatibility. With only 7 iterations left and a strong best score already at 0.3385, the highest-value move is a minimal deterministic compatibility patch plus one short low-LR fine-tune from the best checkpoint, then immediate eval if local smoke test passes. Decision: patch model/train/predict to normalize old key names and model_type aliases, run a 6-epoch fine-tune from cam_unet_v3, smoke test locally on val, and if successful submit next iteration.
action.command: python train.py --resume checkpoints/cam_unet_v3.pt --save_path checkpoints/cam_unet_v4.pt --epochs 6 --lr 8e-5 && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/cam_unet_v4.pt --output local_cam_val_predictions.json
